===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Maxie PG.png|thumb|250px|Maxie in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Maxie appeared in ''[[PG07|The Vision]]'', where he boarded the [[Submarine Explorer 1]] at the [[Team Magma Hideout]] with the intention of heading over to the [[Seafloor Cavern]]. Before leaving, he told [[Courtney]] to remain at their hideout to stall {{ga|Brendan}}.
